'''Fibuli''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Trianii Space/Legends|Trianii Space]] [[Annexation of Fibuli|annexed]] by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]].

It was once the site of a major [[Trianii/Legends|Trianii]] colony before three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of fighting turned it into a wasted neutral land. After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] it served as the location for peace talks between the Trianii and the CSA.

One of the planet's major [[City/Legends|cities]] was [[Knanan]].
